POWER OF ATTORNEY 
 
KNOW ALL MEN BY THESE PRESENTS THAT: - 
M/s. Yuratech Global Private Limited, a Company incorporated and registered under the Companies Act, 2013 
(18 of 2013) and having its registered Office at Office no. 128, Master Mind 1, Royal Palms, Aarey Milk Colony, 
Goregaon (E), Mumbai – 400065, hereby constitute, appoint and nominate Mr. Shailesh D Satpute – Sr. Tender 
Executive  (Post) of the Company to be the true and lawful attorneys of the Company in the name and on behalf 
of the Company to do and execute all or any of the following acts and things in consultation with the Head of 
Department or the Director of the Company: 
To co-ordinate with concerned authorities, for execution of contract.  
 
Having: RFP for Supply, Installation & Maintenance of Desktop Computers. 
 
and to sign, execute and deliver all documents in this regard on behalf of the company. 
1. To accept Cheques / drafts, orders for payment or receipt of money in relation to the said contract of the 
company. 
2. To carry on correspondence with any associate Company, Firm, Corporation, Municipal and any Department 
of the central/state government or any other persons or public body and to apply, sign, execute and to submit 
all necessary application, documents/papers etc, that may be required or deemed proper for/or in relation to 
the said contract or bid of the Company. 
AND IT IS HEREBY EXPRESSLY DECLARED that the Power to do or execute any act, deed or thing which is hereby 
conferred upon the attorney shall include the power to do everything which is incidental to or required for giving 
complete effect to the same in the ordinary course of business. AND the Company do hereby agree to ratify and 
confirm all the necessary acts, deeds, matters and things they said Attorney shall do or cause to be done by 
virtue of Powers hereby conferred through this deed. 
 
This Power of Attorney shall remain in force until the said Attorney remains in the employment with the 
Company or the revocation of this Power of Attorney, whichever is earlier. 
IN WITNESS whereof Mr. Nitin Kanse - Director, who is authorized by the resolution passed at the Meeting of 
the Board of Directors of the Company held on 1st April 2024 to execute these presents on behalf of the 
Company, has set his hand to this Power of Attorney at Mumbai and as per terms of the said Board Resolution, 
the Common seal of the Company is affixed thereon in his presence.

OPTION CLAUSE: The Purchaser reserves the right to increase or decrease the quantity to be ordered up to 25 
percent of bid quantity at the time of placement of contract. The purchaser also reserves the right to increase 
the ordered quantity up to 25% of the contracted quantity during the currency of the contract at the 
contracted rates. The delivery period of quantity shall commence from the last date of original delivery order 
and in cases where option clause is exercised during the extended delivery period the additional time shall 
commence from the last date of extended delivery period. The additional delivery time shall be (Increased

delivery period is less than 30 days, the additional time equals the original delivery period. The Purchaser may
